problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Resonant. Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
